summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new eligibility_matcher feature. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. All eligibility scenarios tested including low/high income, age restrictions, and query filters. Profiler agent successfully updated to use eligibility_matcher instead of check_eligibility. Frontend shows login interface but has session persistence issues preventing full UI flow testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Session does not persist after successful OTP verification - redirects back to login screen
Send button remains disabled even after text input, preventing message submission

passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Backend responding correctly
✅ Eligibility Check - Low Income Profile (all schemes eligible)
✅ Eligibility Check - High Income Profile (PM-KISAN & Ayushman ineligible with correct reasons)
✅ Eligibility Check - Minor Age Profile (age-based ineligibility working)
✅ Eligibility Check - User ID lookup (fetches profile from DB)
✅ Eligibility Check - Query Filter (returns only matched schemes)
✅ MCP Tools List - Both search_schemes AND eligibility_matcher registered
✅ Profiler Agent Flow - Complete 4-step profile completion
✅ Profiler Agent - Now calls eligibility_matcher (not check_eligibility)
✅ Profiler Agent - Eligibility results returned with tool calls
✅ Profile Data Persistence - All fields saved correctly in MongoDB
✅ Post-Profiler Chat - Normal chat resumes after completion
✅ Search Schemes - Kisan, Health, and Sukanya queries working
✅ Core Features - Schemes list, profile management working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management - user gets logged out immediately after OTP verification, and chat send button remains disabled preventing message flow testing. Backend eligibility_matcher feature is working perfectly.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend: 30% (login works but session/chat issues prevent full flow)
